name: DigitalOceanProviderConnection
description: DigitalOcean connection supporting inline and runner authentication modes, with optional Spaces (S3-compatible) storage credentials.

fields.name: runner
fields.description: Slug of a RunnerRegistration. Required when auth_mode=runner.

fields.name: api_token
fields.description: DigitalOcean personal access token. Required when auth_mode=inline.
